CustomField.description: The execution priority for this strategy relative to other strategies for the same Feature Flag. Strategies are evaluated in ascending order (e.g., 1, then 2, then 3).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The execution priority for this rule (e.g., 1, 2, 3). Rules are processed in ascending order (lowest number first). The first rule to find a match wins.
CustomField.label: Order
